name: Nano Banana
description: Optimizes output prompts for the Nano Banana model, focusing on vibrant colors, organic shapes, and ultra-crisp textures.

name: Midjourney
description: Structures prompts with highly artistic visual descriptors, custom camera suffixes, and aspect ratio tags like '--ar 21:9'.

name: ChatGTP Image 2
description: Tailors descriptive, natural paragraph prompts optimal for ChatGPT's image generator, avoiding raw tag suffixes.
